form_data.Idea Name: AI-Driven Intelligent Traffic Congestion and Accident Prediction System
form_data.Expected benefits:
Reduced traffic congestion.
Lower accident rates.
Improved commuter experience.
form_data.Idea Description: This system uses AI models to predict traffic congestion and accident-prone zones by analyzing traffic sensor data, GPS traces, road conditions, weather information, and historical accident records. It helps traffic authorities optimize signal timings and improve road safety.
form_data.potentail Challenges:
Real-time data ingestion at scale.
Integration of heterogeneous traffic data sources.
Maintaining prediction accuracy during abnormal events.
